title: What is the single most important thing here?
guidance: Reward insight and restraint over coverage — the one thing that should change the decision.

runner_input.instruction: Identify the single most important insight from the data below. This will become the lead slide at a board meeting.
runner_input.constraints: One slide title and 1–2 sentences of insight. No bullet lists. Prioritise what changes the decision, not what recaps the situation.

source_blocks.text: A portfolio company missed its quarterly revenue target by 6%. The CRO has proposed increasing marketing spend 30% to 'refill the top of funnel.'

items: Two senior AEs resigned this quarter

hidden_metadata.key_insight: MQL-to-SQL conversion is broken; top-funnel spend will not fix it

rubric_notes: The top of funnel is not the problem — MQLs are up 22% while SQLs are flat.
The CRO's proposal pours water into a leaking middle of the funnel.
Two AE departures likely compound the conversion collapse — should be surfaced.
Penalise responses that hedge by listing multiple possible causes without taking a stance.
